case_title: VANINA G PARKER VS. MARY K MYERS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-03-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VANINA G. PARKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARY K. MYERS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO THE PLAINTIFF, RETRUNED: RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, UNKNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD, RETURN TO SENDER.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,681.91 FILED BY PARKER, VANINA G AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, MARY K AKA KITTY MYERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $50 REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKER, VANINA G AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, MARY K AKA KITTY MYERS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF VANINA G. PARKER. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT MARK K. MYERS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
